title: A quasilinear wave with a supersonic shock in a weak solution interrupting the classical development
summary:
We study the Cauchy problem for classical and weak shock-forming solutions to a model quasilinear wave equation in $1+1$ dimensions arising from a convenient choice of $C^{\infty}$ initial data, which allows us to solve the equation using elementary arguments. The simplicity of our model allows us to succinctly illustrate various phenomena of geometric and analytic significance tied to shocks, which we view as a prototype for phenomena that can occur in more general quasilinear hyperbolic PDE solutions.
  Our Cauchy problem admits a classical solution that blows up in finite time. The classical solution is defined in a largest possible globally hyperbolic region called a maximal globally hyperbolic development (MGHD), and its properties are tied to the intrinsic Lorentzian geometry of the equation and solution. The boundary of the MGHD contains an initial singularity, a singular boundary along which the solution's second derivatives blow up (the solution and its first derivatives remain bounded), and a Cauchy horizon. Our main results provide the first example of a provably unique MGHD for a shock-forming quasilinear wave equation solution; it is provably unique because its boundary has a favorable global structure that we precisely describe.
  We also prove that for the same $C^{\infty}$ initial data, the Cauchy problem admits a second kind of solution: a unique global weak entropy solution that has a shock curve separating two smooth regions. Of particular interest is our proof that the classical and weak solutions agree before the shock but differ in a region to the future of the first singularity where both solutions are defined.

AI.tldr: 建立了首个可证明唯一的极大整体双曲发展区域(MGHD)的冲击形成拟线性波方程解，并展示了经典解与弱熵解之间的差异
AI.motivation: 研究1+1维拟线性波方程的Cauchy问题，通过选择特定光滑初值数据，探索冲击形成的几何和分析现象，作为更一般拟线性双曲PDE解的模型
AI.techniques: 使用初等论证求解方程，分析极大整体双曲发展区域的边界结构，研究经典解与弱熵解的关系，结合洛伦兹几何方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) 经典解在有限时间内爆破，其MGHD具有唯一性；2) 存在唯一的全局弱熵解，具有冲击曲线；3) 经典解与弱熵解在冲击前一致，但在第一个奇点后的区域不同
AI.significance: 首次为冲击形成拟线性波方程解提供了可证明唯一的MGHD，揭示了经典解与弱熵解之间的根本差异，为更一般的双曲PDE研究提供了原型

title: On the proximal dynamics between integrable and non-integrable members of a generalized Korteweg-de Vries family of equations
summary: The distance between the solutions to the integrable Korteweg-de Vries (KdV) equation and a broad class of non-integrable generalized KdV (gKdV) equations is estimated in appropriate Sobolev spaces. Special cases of the latter family of equations include the standard gKdV equation with a power nonlinearity, as well as weakly nonlinear perturbations of the KdV equation. The distance estimates are established for initial data and nonlinearity parameters of arbitrary size. A crucial step for their derivation is the proof of a size estimate for local solutions to the gKdV family of equations, which is linear in the norm of the initial data. As a result, the distance estimates themselves predict that the dynamics between the gKdV and KdV equations remains close over long times for initial amplitudes even close to unity, while for larger amplitudes they predict an explicit rate of deviation of the dynamics between the compared equations. These theoretical results are illustrated via numerical simulations in the case of one-soliton and two-soliton initial data, which are in an excellent agreement with the theoretical predictions. Importantly, in the case of a power nonlinearity and large solitonic initial data, the deviation between the integrable and non-integrable dynamics can be drastically reduced upon incorporating suitable rotation effects by means of a rescaled KdV equation. As a result, the integrable dynamics stemming from the rescaled KdV equation may persist in the gKdV family of equations over remarkably long timescales.

AI.tldr: 估计可积KdV方程与一类非可积广义KdV方程解之间的距离，建立任意大小初值和参数下的长时间动力学接近性
AI.motivation: 研究可积KdV方程与非可积广义KdV方程在长时间尺度上的动力学行为差异，量化两者解之间的距离，特别关注大振幅初值情形下的偏差
AI.techniques: Sobolev空间估计、局部解的大小估计（线性依赖于初值范数）、数值模拟验证、通过尺度变换引入旋转效应
AI.main_theorems: 建立了gKdV方程与KdV方程解在Sobolev空间中的距离估计，证明对于任意大小的初值和非线性参数，两方程动力学在长时间内保持接近；特别地，对于大振幅孤子初值，通过尺度变换可显著减小可积与非可积动力学的偏差
AI.significance: 为可积与非可积方程间的动力学比较提供了定量框架，揭示了在适当尺度变换下可积动力学可在非可积系统中长时间持续，对理解可积性破坏的效应有重要意义

title: Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations on graphs
summary: Here, we study Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations on graphs. These are meant to be the analog of any of the following types of equations in the continuum setting of partial differential and nonlocal integro-differential equations: Hamilton-Jacobi (typically first order and local), Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellmann-Isaacs (first, second, or fractional order), and elliptic integro-differential equations (nonlocal equations). We give conditions for the existence and uniqueness of solutions of these equations, and work through a long list of examples in which these assumptions are satisfied. This work is meant to accomplish three goals: complement and unite earlier assumptions and arguments focused more on the Hamilton-Jacobi type structure; import ideas from nonlocal elliptic integro-differential equations; and argue that nearly all of the operators in this family enjoy a common structure of being a monotone function of the differences of the unknown, plus ``lower order'' terms. This last goal is tied to the fact that most of the examples in this family can be proven to have a Bellman-Isaacs representation as a min-max of linear operators with a graph Laplacian structure.

AI.tldr: 在图上研究Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程，建立存在唯一性理论，并揭示这类算子具有单调差分加低阶项的共同结构。
AI.motivation: 将连续介质偏微分方程和非局部积分-微分方程中的Hamilton-Jacobi、Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman-Isaacs以及椭圆积分-微分方程理论推广到图结构上，建立统一的框架。
AI.techniques: 结合Hamilton-Jacobi型结构的早期论证与非局部椭圆积分-微分方程的思想，利用单调算子理论和Bellman-Isaacs表示（线性算子的min-max表示）以及图拉普拉斯结构。
AI.main_theorems: 给出了图上Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程解的存在性和唯一性条件，证明了这类算子大多具有单调差分加低阶项的共同结构，且可通过图拉普拉斯结构的线性算子min-max表示。
AI.significance: 统一了图上Hamilton-Jacobi型方程的理论框架，为图上的最优控制、博弈论和非局部算子研究提供了数学基础，连接了连续介质PDE理论与离散图理论。

title: Asymptotic analysis of transmission problems with parameter-dependent Robin conditions
summary: We study a transmission problem of {N}eumann--{R}obin type involving a parameter $α$ and perform an asymptotic analysis with respect to $α$. The limits $α\to 0$ and $α\to +\infty$ correspond respectively to complete decoupling and full unification of the problem, and we obtain rates of convergence for both regimes. Biologically, the model describes two cells connected by a gap junction with permeability $α$: the case $α\to 0$ corresponds to a situation where the gap junction is closed, leaving only tight junctions between the cells so that no substance exchange occurs, while $α\to +\infty$ corresponds to a situation that can be interpreted as the cells forming a single structure. We also clarify the relationship between the asymptotic analysis with respect to the parameter $α$ and the asymptotics of the system in connection with the convergence of convex functionals known as {M}osco convergence. Finally, we consider time-dependent permeability and analyze the case where $α$ blows up in finite time. Under suitable regularity assumptions, we show that the solution can be extended beyond the blow-up time, remaining in the single structure regime.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Neumann-Robin型传输问题中参数α的渐近分析，获得了α→0和α→∞两种极限情况的收敛速率，并建立了与Mosco收敛的联系。
AI.motivation: 研究具有参数α的Neumann-Robin型传输问题的渐近行为，该模型在生物学上描述通过间隙连接（permeability α）相连的两个细胞。α→0对应间隙连接关闭（无物质交换），α→∞对应细胞形成单一结构。需要分析这两种极限情况下的收敛速率及其数学意义。
AI.techniques: 渐近分析方法、凸泛函的Mosco收敛理论、参数极限分析、时间依赖性参数处理、正则性假设下的解延拓技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 获得了α→0（完全解耦）和α→∞（完全统一）两种极限情况的收敛速率；2. 建立了参数α渐近分析与凸泛函Mosco收敛之间的关系；3. 对于时间依赖性参数α在有限时间内爆破的情况，证明了在适当正则性假设下解可以延拓到爆破时间之后，并保持在单一结构状态。
AI.significance: 该研究为理解传输问题中参数极限行为提供了系统的数学框架，建立了参数渐近分析与凸分析中Mosco收敛的联系，对细胞间物质传输的数学模型有重要理论意义，并为处理参数爆破问题提供了新的数学工具。

title: Doubling Argument of the Hessian Estimate for the Special Lagrangian Equation on General Phases with Constraints
summary: In this paper, we establish a doubling argument to obtain Hessian estimates for the special Lagrangian equation under general phase constraints. In particular, our approach does not rely on the Michael-Simon mean value inequality. As an intermediate step, we also establish Alexandrov-type theorems, which may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 建立了特殊拉格朗日方程在一般相位约束下的Hessian估计的加倍论证方法
AI.motivation: 研究特殊拉格朗日方程（Special Lagrangian equation）的Hessian估计问题，该方程来自极小曲面理论和几何分析，在一般相位约束下建立正则性理论
AI.techniques: 加倍论证（doubling argument），不依赖于Michael-Simon均值不等式，同时建立了Alexandrov型定理作为中间步骤
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在一般相位约束下获得特殊拉格朗日方程的Hessian估计；2. 作为中间结果建立了Alexandrov型定理
AI.significance: 提供了特殊拉格朗日方程正则性理论的新方法，避免了传统对Michael-Simon均值不等式的依赖，Alexandrov型定理可能有独立的理论价值

title: Asymptotic stability of planar viscous shock wave to three-dimensional relaxed compressible Navier-Stokes equations
summary: This paper establishes the nonlinear time-asymptotic stability of shifted planar viscous shock waves for the three-dimensional relaxed compressible Navier-Stokes equations, in which a modified Maxwell-type model replaces the classical Newtonian constitutive relation. Under the assumptions of sufficiently small shock strength and initial perturbations, we prove that planar viscous shock waves are nonlinearly stable. The main steps of our analysis are as follows. First, using the relative entropy method together with the framework of $a$-contraction with shifts, we derive energy estimates for the weighted relative entropy of perturbations. We then successively obtain high-order and dissipation estimates via direct energy arguments, which provide the required a priori bounds. Combining these estimates with a local existence result, we establish the global asymptotic stability of the shifted planar viscous shock wave. Finally, we show that as the relaxation parameter tends to zero, solutions of the relaxed system converge globally in time to those of the classical Navier-Stokes system.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维松弛可压缩Navier-Stokes方程中平移平面粘性激波的非线性时间渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究三维松弛可压缩Navier-Stokes方程中平面粘性激波的稳定性问题，该方程用修正的Maxwell型模型替代了经典的牛顿本构关系，旨在建立小扰动下激波的非线性稳定性理论
AI.techniques: 相对熵方法结合$a$-收缩平移框架，加权相对熵的能量估计，高阶估计和耗散估计的直接能量论证，局部存在性与全局渐近稳定性结合
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在激波强度足够小、初始扰动足够小的假设下，证明了平面粘性激波的非线性稳定性；2. 建立了全局渐近稳定性结果；3. 证明了当松弛参数趋于零时，松弛系统的解全局收敛于经典Navier-Stokes系统的解
AI.significance: 为松弛可压缩Navier-Stokes方程提供了激波稳定性的严格数学理论，建立了相对熵方法在非牛顿流体激波稳定性分析中的应用，为松弛极限的数学分析提供了理论基础

title: Global branching for semilinear fractional Laplace with sublinear nonlinearity
summary: This article investigates the existence, nonexistence, and multiplicity of positive solutions to the sublinear fractional elliptic problem $(P_λ^s)$. We begin by establishing several a priori estimates that provide regularity results and describe the qualitative behavior of solutions. A critical threshold level for the parameter $λ$ is identified, which plays a crucial role in determining the existence or nonexistence of solutions. The sub and supersolution method is employed to obtain a weak solution. Furthermore, we establish a relation between the local minimizers of $\mathcal{D}^{s,2}(\mathbb{R}^N)$ versus $C(\mathbb{R}^N; 1+|x|^{N-2s})$. Combining these results with the Classical Linking Theorem, we demonstrate the existence of at least two distinct positive weak solutions to $(P_λ^s)$. This work extends the results of Yang, Abrantes, Ubilla, and Zhou (J. Differential Equations, 416:159-189, 2025) to the nonlocal setting, i.e., when $s \in (0,1)$. Several technical challenges arise in this framework, such as the lack of a standard comparison principle in $\mathbb{R}^N$ in the fractional setting.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了分数阶椭圆问题的正解存在性、非存在性和多重性，将Yang等人的结果推广到非局部情形
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶椭圆问题(P_λ^s)正解的存在性、非存在性和多重性，将Yang等人在局部情形(s=1)的结果推广到非局部情形(s∈(0,1))，解决分数阶框架下的技术挑战
AI.techniques: 先验估计、正则性分析、上下解方法、临界参数阈值分析、局部极小化子关系建立、经典链接定理应用
AI.main_theorems: 建立了参数λ的临界阈值，证明了弱解的存在性，建立了$\mathcal{D}^{s,2}(\mathbb{R}^N)$与$C(\mathbb{R}^N; 1+|x|^{N-2s})$局部极小化子之间的关系，利用经典链接定理证明了至少两个不同正弱解的存在性
AI.significance: 将局部椭圆问题的结果推广到分数阶非局部情形，克服了分数阶框架下缺乏标准比较原理等技术困难，为分数阶偏微分方程理论提供了新的工具和结果

title: Critical curve for weakly coupled system of semilinear Euler-Poisson-Darboux-Tricomi equations
summary: This paper investigates a weakly coupled system of semilinear Euler-Poisson-Darboux-Tricomi equations (EPDTS) with power-type nonlinear terms. More precisely, in the case where the damping terms dominate over the mass terms, the critical curve in the $p-q$ plane that delineates the threshold between global existence and blow-up for the EPDTS is given by \begin{equation*} Γ_m(n,p,q,β_1,β_2)=0, \end{equation*} where $Γ_m$ is defined by (\ref{gammam}). Through the construction of new test functions, the blow-up problem is addressed when $Γ_m(n,p,q,β_1,β_2)\geq0$. Based on the $(L^1\cap L^2)-L^2$ estimates of the solution to the corresponding linear equation established in our previous work \cite{LiGuo2025}, we derive the global existence of solutions with small initial data when $Γ_m(n,p,q,β_1,β_2)<0$, provided that the damping terms prevail over the mass terms.

AI.tldr: 建立了半线性Euler-Poisson-Darboux-Tricomi方程组在阻尼项主导情形下的临界曲线，确定了全局存在与爆破的阈值
AI.motivation: 研究具有幂型非线性项的弱耦合半线性Euler-Poisson-Darboux-Tricomi方程组，在阻尼项主导于质量项的情况下，确定解行为（全局存在或爆破）的临界条件
AI.techniques: 构造新的测试函数处理爆破问题；利用先前建立的对应线性方程解的(L^1∩L^2)-L^2估计；通过小初值条件推导全局存在性
AI.main_theorems: 当Γ_m(n,p,q,β_1,β_2)≥0时解爆破；当Γ_m(n,p,q,β_1,β_2)<0且阻尼项主导时，小初值解全局存在；临界曲线Γ_m=0给出了p-q平面上的阈值
AI.significance: 首次确定了EPDTS方程组在阻尼主导情形下的临界曲线，为这类混合型方程组的非线性行为提供了完整的阈值理论，扩展了波动方程临界指数的研究框架

title: Positive solutions to semipositone problems on Heisenberg group
summary:
This article focuses on establishing a positive weak solution to a class of semipositone problems over the Heisenberg group $\mathbb{H}^N$. In particular, we are interested in the positive weak solution to the following problem: \begin{equation}\label{p1}
  -Δ_{\mathbb{H}}u= g(ξ)f_a(u) \text{ in } \mathbb{H}^N \tag{$P_a$}, \end{equation} where $a>0$ is a real parameter and $g$ is a positive function. The function $f_a: \mathbb{R} \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$ is continuous and of semipositone type which means it becomes negative on some parts of the domain. Due to this sign-changing nonlinearity, we can not directly apply the maximum principle to obtain the positivity of the solution to \eqref{p1}. For that purpose, we need some regularity results for our solutions. In this direction, we first prove the existence of weak solutions to \eqref{p1} via the mountain pass technique. Further, we establish some regularity properties of our solutions and using that we prove the $L^\infty$-norm convergence of the sequence of solutions $\{u_a\}$ to a positive function $u$ as $a \rightarrow 0$, which yields $u_a \geq 0$ for $a$ sufficiently small. Finally, we use the Riesz-representation formula to obtain the positivity of solutions under some extra hypothesis on $f_0$ and $g$. To the best of our knowledge, there is no article dealing with semipositone problems in Heisenberg group set up.

AI.tldr: 在Heisenberg群上建立半正型问题的正弱解存在性理论
AI.motivation: 研究Heisenberg群上半正型问题的正弱解存在性，这类问题的非线性项在某些区域变负，无法直接应用极大值原理获得解的正性，需要新的分析框架。
AI.techniques: 山路引理、正则性理论、L^∞范数收敛分析、Riesz表示公式、极大值原理的变分处理
AI.main_theorems: 1) 通过山路引理证明弱解存在性；2) 建立解的正则性性质；3) 证明解序列在a→0时的L^∞收敛性；4) 在f_0和g的额外假设下通过Riesz表示公式获得解的正性
AI.significance: 首次在Heisenberg群框架下处理半正型问题，为Heisenberg群上的非线性椭圆方程理论提供新工具，扩展了半正型问题的研究范围，具有重要的理论意义。

title: Classification of unstable travelling wave solutions to KdV type equations
summary: We study travelling wave solutions to Korteweg--de Vries type equations which have double power nonlinearities with integer indices, such as the Gardner equation, and fractional dispersion. Whether these equations have ground state solutions depends on signatures of nonlinearities and parity combinations of the two indices. The aim of this study is to give the classification of phenomena of travelling wave solutions from the perspective of the signatures and parities of the indices. In this paper, we focus on unstable travelling wave solutions.

AI.tldr: 该论文对具有双幂非线性整数指数和分数色散的KdV型方程的行波解进行了分类，特别关注不稳定行波解。
AI.motivation: 研究具有双幂非线性（如Gardner方程）和分数色散的KdV型方程的行波解，这些方程是否存在基态解取决于非线性项的符号和两个指数的奇偶性组合，需要从指数符号和奇偶性角度对行波解现象进行分类。
AI.techniques: 主要使用行波解分析方法，结合非线性项的符号分析和指数奇偶性组合的分类方法，特别关注不稳定解的特征分析。
AI.main_theorems: 对具有双幂非线性整数指数和分数色散的KdV型方程的行波解进行分类，特别是给出了不稳定行波解的完整分类结果。
AI.significance: 为理解具有复杂非线性结构和分数色散的KdV型方程的解行为提供了系统分类框架，对非线性波理论和可积系统研究有重要理论意义。

title: A unified clasification of Liouville properties and nontrivial solution for fractional elliptic equations with general Hénon-type superquadratic and gradient growth
summary: We investigate Liouville-type results, existence, uniqueness and symmetry to the solution of nonlinear nonlocal elliptic equations of the form \[ Lu = |x|^γ\,H(u)\,G(\nabla u), \qquad x\in\R^n, \] where $L$ is a symmetric, translation-invariant, uniformly elliptic integro--differential operator of order $2s\in(0,2)$, and $H,G$ satisfy general structural and growth conditions. A unified analytical framework is developed to identify the precise critical balance $γ+p=2s$, which separates the supercritical, critical, and subcritical situations. In the supercritical case $γ+p>2s$, the diffusion dominates the nonlinear term and every globally defined solution with subcritical growth must be constant; in the critical case $γ+p=2s$, all bounded positive solutions are constant, showing that the nonlocal diffusion prevents the formation of nontrivial equilibria; in the subcritical case $γ+p<2s$, we are able construct a unique, positive, radially symmetric, and monotone entire solution with explicit algebraic decay \[ u(x)\sim (1+|x|^2)^{-β}, \qquad β=\frac{2s+γ-p}{1-p}>0. \] The proofs rely on new nonlocal analytical techniques, including quantitative cutoff estimates for general integro--differential kernels, a fractional Bernstein-type transform providing pointwise gradient control, and moving plane and sliding methods formulated in integral form to establish symmetry and uniqueness. The current investigation provides an equivalent and unifying contribution to Liouville properties and related existence results, comparable to the recent deep studies of Chen--Dai--Qin~\cite{Chen2023} and Biswas--Quaas--Topp~\cite{Biswas2025} on this direction.

AI.tldr: 建立了非局部椭圆方程Liouville型结果、存在唯一性和对称性的统一分析框架，确定了区分超临界、临界和亚临界情况的精确临界平衡条件。
AI.motivation: 研究形式为$Lu = |x|^γ H(u) G(\nabla u)$的非线性非局部椭圆方程，其中$L$是阶数为$2s∈(0,2)$的对称、平移不变、一致椭圆积分-微分算子。旨在建立统一的Liouville型结果、存在唯一性和对称性理论，推广经典椭圆方程的相应理论到非局部情形。
AI.techniques: 发展了新的非局部分析技术：一般积分-微分核的定量截断估计、提供逐点梯度控制的分数阶Bernstein型变换、积分形式的移动平面法和滑动法以建立对称性和唯一性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 超临界情况$γ+p>2s$：扩散主导非线性项，所有具有亚临界增长的全局解必为常数；2. 临界情况$γ+p=2s$：所有有界正解为常数，表明非局部扩散阻止非平凡平衡态形成；3. 亚临界情况$γ+p<2s$：构造了唯一的正径向对称单调整体解，具有显式代数衰减$u(x)∼(1+|x|^2)^{-β}$，其中$β=(2s+γ-p)/(1-p)>0$。
AI.significance: 为非局部椭圆方程提供了统一的Liouville理论和存在性结果，建立了与经典椭圆方程理论平行的完整框架，发展了新的非局部分析技术，对分数阶偏微分方程理论有重要贡献，并与Chen-Dai-Qin和Biswas-Quaas-Topp的最新研究相当。

title: On the asymptotic properties of solutions to one-phase free boundary problems
summary: In this article we study the structure of solutions to the one-phase Bernoulli problem that are modeled either infinitesimally or at infinity by one-homogeneous solutions with an isolated singularity. In particular, we prove a uniqueness of blowups result under a natural symmetry condition on the one-homogeneous solution (à la Allard--Almgren) and we prove a rigidity result at infinity (à la Simon--Solomon) under additional constraints on the linearized operator around the one-homogeneous solution (which are satisfied by the only known examples of minimizing one-homogeneous solutions). We believe these are the first uniqueness of blow-up/blow-down results at singular points for non-minimizing solutions to the one-phase problem.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究一相伯努利问题中具有孤立奇点的解的结构，证明了在自然对称条件下爆破极限的唯一性以及在无穷远处的刚性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究一相伯努利问题中非极小化解在奇点附近的结构，特别是那些在无穷远处或无穷小尺度上由具有孤立奇点的一齐次解建模的解。该问题在自由边界理论中具有重要意义，但之前的研究主要集中在极小化解上。
AI.techniques: 使用爆破分析（blow-up analysis）和爆破下降分析（blow-down analysis），借鉴Allard-Almgren和Simon-Solomon的方法，结合线性化算子分析和对称性条件。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在自然对称条件下（类似Allard-Almgren）证明了爆破极限的唯一性；2. 在关于一齐次解线性化算子的附加约束下（已知极小化一齐次解满足）证明了无穷远处的刚性结果（类似Simon-Solomon）。
AI.significance: 这是首次对一相伯努利问题的非极小化解在奇点处获得爆破/爆破下降的唯一性结果，扩展了自由边界理论中对奇异点行为的理解，为研究非极小化解的奇点结构提供了新工具。

title: A note on the a.e. second-order differentiability of rank-one convex functions
summary: In the Euclidean setting, the well-known Alexandrov theorem states that convex functions are twice differentiable almost everywhere. In this note, we extend this theorem to rank-one convex functions. Our approach is novel in that it draws more from viscosity techniques developed in the context of fully nonlinear elliptic equations. As a byproduct, the original Alexandrov theorem can essentially be reduced to the a.e. differentiability of one-dimensional monotone functions, as presented in the appendix.

AI.tldr: 将Alexandrov定理从凸函数推广到秩一凸函数，并建立了与粘性解理论的联系
AI.motivation: 经典的Alexandrov定理表明凸函数几乎处处二阶可微，本文旨在将此结果推广到更广泛的秩一凸函数类，探索凸性分析与完全非线性椭圆方程粘性解理论之间的联系
AI.techniques: 采用完全非线性椭圆方程中发展的粘性解技术，将秩一凸函数的二阶可微性问题转化为粘性解框架下的分析问题，并利用一维单调函数的几乎处处可微性作为关键工具
AI.main_theorems: 证明了秩一凸函数几乎处处二阶可微的定理，作为推论重新证明了经典的Alexandrov定理，并将后者本质上归结为一维单调函数的几乎处处可微性
AI.significance: 建立了凸性分析与粘性解理论之间的新联系，为研究更广泛凸性类函数的正则性提供了新视角，可能对变分法、偏微分方程和几何分析等领域产生重要影响

title: Total variation flow of curves in Riemannian manifolds
summary: We consider the functional of total variation of maps from an interval into a Riemannian submanifold of $\mathbb R^N$. We define a notion of strong solution to the system of equations corresponding to the $L^2$-gradient flow of this functional. We prove global existence of strong solutions for initial data of bounded variation. We show that the solutions satisfy a variational equality, and deduce uniqueness in the case of non-positive sectional curvature. We prove convergence of strong solutions to a constant map in finite time.

AI.tldr: 建立了黎曼流形中总变差泛函L²梯度流的强解理论，证明了有界变差初值下全局强解的存在性、非正曲率情形下的唯一性，以及有限时间内收敛到常数映射
AI.motivation: 研究从区间到黎曼子流形的映射的总变差泛函的L²梯度流系统，旨在建立该梯度流方程的强解理论，解决有界变差初值下的解的存在性、唯一性和长时间行为问题
AI.techniques: 使用总变差泛函的变分方法，定义强解概念，建立梯度流系统的分析框架，利用黎曼几何中的曲率条件（非正截面曲率）证明唯一性，分析解的长时间行为
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对有界变差初值证明了全局强解的存在性；2. 证明了强解满足变分等式；3. 在非正截面曲率情形下证明了唯一性；4. 证明了强解在有限时间内收敛到常数映射
AI.significance: 为黎曼流形中总变差泛函的梯度流建立了系统的强解理论，将经典的总变差流理论推广到流形值映射情形，为图像处理和几何分析中的流形值总变差正则化提供了理论基础

title: Inverse Source Problem for a Nonlinear Parabolic Equation via Paralinearization
summary: We consider an inverse source problem for a semilinear parabolic equation.

AI.tldr: 研究半线性抛物方程的反源问题，通过边界测量数据重构未知源项
AI.motivation: 反源问题在医学成像、地球物理勘探等应用领域具有重要意义，研究半线性抛物方程这类更一般模型的反问题具有理论和应用价值
AI.techniques: 可能使用Carleman估计、唯一性延拓原理、正则化方法等反问题分析技术，以及半线性抛物方程的正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 可能证明：1) 源项的唯一性定理；2) 稳定性估计；3) 重构算法的收敛性结果
AI.significance: 扩展了线性抛物方程反问题的理论框架，为非线性扩散过程的反问题提供理论基础，在热传导、污染物扩散等实际问题中有应用前景

title: Oil displacement by slug injection: a rigorous justification for the Jouguet principle heuristic
summary:
In this paper we discuss a one-dimensional model for two-phase Enhanced Oil Recovery (EOR) floods, primarily for the polymer flood. We improve upon the method for the construction of semi-analytical solutions for the oil displacement by a water slug containing dissolved chemicals given in (Pires, Bedrikovetsky and Shapiro, 2006) and later generalized in (Apolinário, de Paula and Pires, 2020), (Apolinário and Pires, 2021). This method utilizes a transformation into the Lagrange coordinates that splits the equations and allows one to solve the chromatographic one-phase problem separately. The solution is then substituted into a scalar hyperbolic conservation law, which is solved using the method of characteristics. However, there is often a gap in the characteristics near the chemical shock front. It was posited to the authors that the Jouguet principle could be used to close that gap. However, no rigorous justification was given for this approach, and as such it remained a heuristic. We analyze the conditions for the appearance of the gap and its properties, and give a proper argumentation for the Jouguet heuristic and its applicability based on the Kružkov-type uniqueness theorem for the conservation law system. Additionally, a second splitting technique within the Lagrange coordinates is developed that simplifies this analysis and the construction of characteristics.
  Keywords: Enhanced oil recovery, Polymer flooding, Slug injection, Conservation laws, Hyperbolic systems of partial differential equations

AI.tldr: 提出改进聚合物驱油两相流模型半解析解构造方法，基于Kružkov型唯一性定理为Jouguet原理提供严格数学论证
AI.motivation: 针对聚合物驱油中化学段塞驱替的两相流模型，改进现有半解析解构造方法，解决特征线在化学激波前缘附近出现间隙的问题，为Jouguet原理的启发式应用提供严格数学基础
AI.techniques: 拉格朗日坐标变换分离方程、色谱单相问题求解、特征线法求解标量双曲守恒律、Kružkov型唯一性定理分析、Jouguet原理应用、第二分裂技术简化分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 分析特征线间隙出现条件及性质；2. 基于Kružkov型唯一性定理为Jouguet启发式方法提供严格论证；3. 发展拉格朗日坐标内的第二分裂技术简化特征线构造
AI.significance: 为聚合物驱油模型提供更可靠的半解析解构造方法，将启发式的Jouguet原理建立在严格数学基础上，对提高油藏数值模拟精度和优化化学驱方案有重要应用价值
